# Summary Generation

Generate a concise summary of the following {{summary_type}}.

## Content

{{content}}

## Instructions

- Write 2-3 sentences maximum.
- Focus on the key changes or decisions.
- Use clear, non-technical language where possible.
- If summarizing a PR, mention what was changed and why.
- If summarizing an issue, mention the problem and any proposed solutions.

Respond with plain text (no JSON, no markdown formatting).
